content: Planner, confirmed ceo/4cf2171d proposal-1-clinerules.md status: needs-approval, never approved. Wrote .pmcro/trails/ceo/4cf2171d-4600-46a8-84bf-93939bc26aaa/SUPERSEDED-BY.md as a new addendum file (sealed trail's existing files left untouched per Article 3 / trail-schema.md immutability).

Planner, wrote root-level .clinerules -- the Colony Constitution, 5 articles (Trail-required action, TYPE1/TYPE2 boundary restated from hil-gating.md, sealed-trail immutability, Linguistic Chain of Custody, verification-before-report) plus a Ratification clause that ties the file's own effect to this trail's approval. File header states status: staged, needs-approval, and explicitly distinguishes this from the not-recommended Cline Memory Bank proposal it shares a filename with.

Planner, edited catalog/Platform/PMCR-O/skills/orchestrator/skills/orchestrator-role/SKILL.md step 3 to add the Linguistic Chain of Custody requirement and handoff_verified gate on PASS. Also edited references/trail-schema.md's check.jsonl disposition line shape to add the handoff_verified field, so the schema doc and the skill doc stay in sync (same discipline EC-012 already established for the marketplace twins).

Planner, edited catalog/Platform/PMCR-O/skills/orchestrator/commands/brief-session.md Round Table section (step 2) to play back a trail's hand-off addressing lines verbatim when present, and to explicitly say 'no hand-off record -- pre-dates the Linguistic Protocol' for trails written before Article 4 existed, rather than fabricating addressing for them.

Planner, flagging per your seq 6 instruction: this cycle wrote to catalog/ (orchestrator-role/SKILL.md, trail-schema.md, brief-session.md). Not self-sealing accept -- handing to Checker with that constraint explicit.
